entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop Pennisetum americanum studied for its response to inoculation and fertilization

entities.name: AZOSPIRILLUM
entities.description: N2-fixing bacteria used for inoculation of pearl millet

entities.name: AZOTOBACTER
entities.description: N2-fixing bacteria used for inoculation of pearl millet

entities.name: NITROGEN FERTILIZER
entities.description: Chemical nitrogen application used in the experiments

entities.name: FARM YARD MANURE
entities.description: Organic fertilizer application used in the experiments

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the 25 experiments were conducted

entities.name: INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of applying N2-fixing bacteria to the plants

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of grain production, which increased with inoculation

entities.name: PLANT BIOMASS YIELD
entities.description: The total biological mass of the plant, which increased with continued inoculation

entities.name: NITROGEN UPTAKE
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen absorbed by the plant, which increased with continued inoculation and combined fertilizer

entities.name: GRAIN NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of nitrogen in the grain, which was not affected by inoculation

relationships.description: Inoculation was applied to pearl millet cultivars
Azospirillum was one of the bacteria used for inoculation
Azotobacter was one of the bacteria used for inoculation
Nitrogen fertilizer was applied to pearl millet
Farm yard manure was applied to pearl millet
Inoculation increased grain yield in 46% of experiments
Continued inoculation increased plant biomass yield
Inoculation did not increase grain nitrogen content
Combined application of nitrogen fertilizer and FYM tended to increase yield
Combined application of nitrogen fertilizer and FYM tended to increase yield
Combined application of nitrogen fertilizer and FYM tended to increase nitrogen uptake
Combined application of nitrogen fertilizer and FYM tended to increase nitrogen uptake
Pearl millet experiments were conducted at several locations in India
